text: - a. General. Owner  has  arranged  for  the  Project  to  be  insured  under  an  Owner Controlled Insurance Program ( OCIP') .  Parties performing labor or services at the Project site are required to enroll in the OCIP, unless they are Excluded Parties (as defined  below).    The  OCIP  will  provide  to  Enrolled  Parties  (as  defined  below) Commercial General Liability insurance and Excess Liability insurance (collectively, the 'OCIP Insurance Policies'), as summarily described below, in connection  with  their  operations  at  the  Project  site  (as  defined  by  the  OCIP Insurance Policies).  The amounts and terms of coverage provided by the OCIP are determined by the OCIP Policies.
